description: For first executed instruction, PC has to be PC that should occur after reset.
If previous instruction does not require other PC adaption and no special event appeared in between, standard PC increment occurs.
notes: Required blackboxing of submodules to verify within 24 hours.

description: Prove for correct PC set when an interrupt occurred.

Prove for correct PC set when returned from debug mode.
Prove for correct PC set when previous instruction was jal instruction.
Prove for correct PC set when previous instruction was jalr instruction.
Prove for correct PC set when previous instruction branch was taken.
Prove for correct PC set when previous instruction was MRET.
